title: A Promise Painted on Laboon
main_description: Luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line. The reviewed chapter file is organized into display-ready story parts with cleaned dialogue and context-based speaker names.
key_events: Nami Learns About the Log Pose
The Road to the Final Island
Mr. 9 and Miss Wednesday Ask for Help
